Templates › Business Operations › Employment › Holiday Application Form Template

Holiday Application Form Template

Use This Template
Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form.

Employee Information

Employee Name *

Holiday Information

basic
This template includes features available in WPForms Basic. Compare Plans

The Holiday Application Form Template by WPForms is designed for businesses, HR professionals, and managers looking to improve the holiday application and approval process for employees.

How Does the Holiday Application Form Template Work?

The Holiday Application Form Template requires the WPForms Basic License, since it uses numerous Fancy Fields to collect employee information about their holidays/leaves. Fields include:

  • Employee Information:
    • Employee Name: Captures the full name of the employee applying for leave.
    • Email Address: Records the employee’s email for updates on the approval.
    • Phone Number: A contact number for any urgent communication.
    • Employee ID: An identifier to link the application with the employee’s records.
    • Position: The job title or role of the employee within the organization.
  • Holiday Information:
    • Reason: A dropdown menu to select the reason for their holiday.
    • Start Date: The proposed commencement date of the holiday.
    • End Date: The intended conclusion date for the holiday.
    • Number of Days: Automatically calculated based on the start and end dates.
    • Additional Comments: Space for any details the employee wishes to add.

Sign up with WPForms today and access the Holiday Application Form Template. It is ideal for HR departments, team leaders, and small business owners who want to manage employee leave requests effortlessly.

Our form templates let you create any kind of WordPress form in a few clicks.

You can select any template to view the demo and try it out. If it works for you, you can import it and publish it in minutes. Each WPForms template is fully customizable too. Our drag and drop form builder makes it easy to adapt any template to fits your business’ needs. When you use our form templates, you can easily:

  • Import Any Template With 1 Click

    Ready to get started? Import any form template and start customizing it right away.

  • Add or Remove Fields

    Use our simple drag and drop form builder to add fields, delete them, or move them around.

  • Customize Notification Settings

    It’s easy to edit the notification emails on any template with your own text or smart tags.

  • Change the Confirmation Message

    Easily display a custom message after submission – or forward your visitor to another page.

  • Change the Field Labels

    Click on a field and change the text to collect the exact information you need.

  • Change the Notification Email

    Add CCed recipients and multiple notifications so you never miss an entry.

  • Customize the Submit Button

    Adapt the words on the button and change the color so that it matches your theme.

  • Publish Your Form With Ease

    Hit publish — that's it! WPForms makes it easy to get your forms online without writing code.

  • Get Instant Form Insights

    Track form submissions with our built-in analytics to see how your forms perform.

WPForms makes it easy to publish forms on any post or page. You can also publish your forms in the WordPress sidebar or footer. And because we integrate with page builders, you can easily make an Elementor contact form, or publish any form on a landing page in SeedProd.
